tasks.subject: Add freshlyImported flag to DependenciesGraphNode
tasks.description: Add `freshlyImported?: boolean` to DependenciesGraphNode in deps/graph-builder/src/lockfileToDepGraph.ts. Set it in linkAllPkgs based on whether importMethod is truthy.

tasks.subject: Skip self-dep symlink and bin linking for warm GVS packages
tasks.description: In linkAllPkgs: skip self-dep symlink when !importMethod && enableGlobalVirtualStore. In linkAllBins: skip the entire depNode when !depNode.freshlyImported && enableGlobalVirtualStore. No try/catch, no allowReadonlyErrors.

tasks.subject: Add tests for skip-linking behavior
tasks.description: linkAllPkgs and linkAllBins are private — testing requires full integration setup with a real store and registry mock. The change is a simple boolean guard (2 lines of logic). Integration testing of GVS with read-only stores requires an actual Nix environment. Skipping test addition — the logic is trivially verifiable by inspection and will be validated by the existing GVS integration testing in the Nix environment where this problem occurs."

tasks.subject: Create changeset and verify
tasks.description: Create changeset, compile both packages, run tests, push and open PR.
